debug_info.goal:

m R : NNReal
hr : R ≠ 0
⊢ centerOfMass (RigidBody.solidSphere d.succ m R) = 0

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h1 : (solidSphere d.succ m R).centerOfMass = 0 := by

        <;>

        <;>

        <;>
        (try positivity)
      }

    <;>

        simp_all [integral_const, volume_closedBall]
        <;>
        (try ring_nf)
        <;>
        (try field_simp [hr])
        <;>
        (try norm_num)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [ENNReal.ofReal_coe_nnreal, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq])
        <;>

        <;>
        (try positivity)
        <;>
        (try
          {

            simp_all [integral_eq_zero_of_ae_stronglyMeasurable_of_support_null]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [ae_restrict_mem])
            <;>
            (try
              {
                -- Prove that the set is null (placeholder, would require actual proof in Lean)
                simp_all [MeasureTheory.ae_restrict_mem]
              }
            )
          }
        )
      }
    )
    <;>
    (try
      {
        -- If the integral is zero, then the center of mass is zero
        simp_all [integral_eq_zero_of_ae_stronglyMeasurable_of_support_null]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [ae_restrict_mem])
        <;>
        (try
          {
            -- Prove that the set is null (placeholder, would require actual proof in Lean)
            simp_all [MeasureTheory.ae_restrict_mem]

        <;>
